author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .eml files locally with headers, safe body previews, attachment metadata, and raw MIME source. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .eml files locally with headers, safe body previews, attachment metadata, and raw MIME source.
manifest.name: EML Email Viewer

name: EML Email Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Fix Obsidian automated review source-code error by removing direct innerHTML assignment from the HTML preview renderer.

- Rebuilds sanitized HTML previews from an allowlist of safe DOM nodes and attributes.
- Adds smoke-test coverage for innerHTML, outerHTML, and insertAdjacentHTML absence in runtime source.
- Keeps remote content, active URL attributes, scripts, styles, forms, attachment opening, clipboard access, and write-back blocked.

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial release of EML Email Viewer.

- Opens local .eml files in a read-only Obsidian file view.
- Shows header summary, text and sanitized HTML previews, attachment metadata, raw MIME source, search, refresh, MIME warnings, and render caps.
- Blocks remote content, scripts, external styles, forms, active URL attributes, attachment opening, clipboard access, mail sync, IMAP/SMTP, send/reply/forward/archive/import behavior, and write-back.
